race.description: Warrnambool Football Netball Club Maiden Plate
race.comment: KINGS REFLECTION (4) was in the market on debut and went back from the wide gate over a mile but stormed home into second. Eye-catching first outing and won't be a maiden long. SADLERS SYMPHONY (6) has placed last three including the fresh-up run over 1400m when a solid third in a small field at Terang. That was first run for six months so will strip much fitter and with the blinkers added looks a leading player. SUPERGRACE (12) is a local hope who is at top and may well relish the extra ground now. ZOUDEADLY (8) has been thereabouts without winning, the latest winding up strongly for fifth over a mile. One of the chances. DURHAM (2) charged home from the back latest and should be in the finish again.

Live1.SchedulerNote: Provincial **Use extended Racing.com coverage where possible**
